details.brokerage: Real estate and business project brokerage is carried out and coordinated by the founder and CEO of GloReal INVESTMENTS, German Randla — holder of a Level 6 professional certificate No. KKM 219715 and a partner and consultant with over 18 years of experience in the real estate sector. The brokerage fee for sales is 3–4% (2.5% for loyal clients) of the property sale price and is paid by the seller (service client). In rental transactions in Estonia, the brokerage fee is typically paid by the tenant and equals one month’s rent. NB! GloReal INVESTMENTS does not add VAT to residential property brokerage fees. VAT is included in the price.
details.management: We provide daily management and maintenance of your property, including utility management, technical supervision, cleaning, coordination of emergency works, and communication with tenants.
details.renovation: We carry out both minor repair works and large-scale renovation projects. We prepare a work plan, procure materials, and ensure high-quality execution.
details.valuation: Property valuation based on market value, taking into account location, condition, market trends, and statistics of comparable properties. Required for sale, rental, or financing purposes.
details.media: We create professional photo and video materials that highlight the best features of your property. We use drones, wide-angle lenses, and styling when necessary.
details.investment: We advise on investment opportunities, including rental properties, development projects, and commercial real estate. We help create strategies and assess risks.
details.financing: If banks do not provide financing, we offer alternative solutions in cooperation with investors. We assess the property, prepare a financial plan, and find the most suitable solution.

brokerage.content: Real estate and business project brokerage is carried out and coordinated by the founder and CEO of GloReal INVESTMENTS, <0>German Randla</0>, holder of a Level 6 professional certificate No. KKM 219715 and a partner and consultant with over 18 years of experience in the real estate sector.
The brokerage fee for sales is 3–4% (2.5% for loyal clients) of the property sale price and is paid by the seller (service client).
In rental transactions in Estonia, the brokerage fee is typically paid by the tenant and equals one month’s rent.
NB! GloReal INVESTMENTS does not add VAT to residential property brokerage fees. VAT is included in the price.

brokerage.text: Send your request and we will contact you shortly

management.content: The property management service for owners provided by GloReal INVESTMENTS is a paid management and maintenance service for your property over a specified period, including the following services:

items: Communication with housing and utility service providers
Coordination of property maintenance and repairs
In case of debts: payment schedules, eviction, legal proceedings
Annual management = 100% of one month’s rent per year
10% — if rental value is below 300.- EUR per month

legal.privacyText:
This Privacy Policy explains how GloReal Investments processes and protects your personal data. Our goal is to ensure that your data is always secure and used only for clearly defined purposes.

We primarily collect personal data when you fill out forms on our website, contact us, or use our services. The collected data may include your name, contact details, property preferences, and other information voluntarily provided by you.

We use your data to provide suitable real estate offers, respond to inquiries, prepare assessments, and improve our services. Data processing is carried out strictly on a lawful basis, and we do not share your data with third parties without your consent, except where required by law.

GloReal Investments implements technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, or loss.

You have the right to access your data, request correction or deletion, and withdraw your consent. To submit a request, please contact us via email.

This Privacy Policy may be updated in accordance with changes in legislation or service enhancements.
legal.cookiesText:
Our website uses cookies to ensure a better user experience, analyze website performance, and provide more relevant content. Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website.

We use both essential cookies necessary for the technical functioning of the website and analytical cookies that help us understand how visitors use the site. This data is anonymous and does not allow personal identification.

You may restrict or completely disable the use of cookies in your browser settings. Please note that blocking cookies may affect the functionality of certain features of the website.

The purpose of using cookies is to improve the quality of our services and provide a smoother and more convenient user experience.
legal.termsText:
These Terms of Use govern the use of the GloReal Investments website and describe the rights and obligations of users. By using the website, you confirm that you have read and agree to comply with these terms.

The information provided on the website is for general informational purposes only and may include estimates, descriptions, and market overviews that may not always be complete or up to date. While we strive to ensure accuracy, we do not guarantee the completeness, correctness, or suitability of the information for any specific purpose.

Users agree to use the website in good faith and refrain from actions that could damage the website’s functionality, security, or availability. Copying, distributing, or modifying website content without written permission from GloReal Investments is prohibited.

The website may contain links to third-party services or external websites. GloReal Investments is not responsible for the content, accuracy, or security of such third-party resources. Use of third-party services is at the user’s own risk.

Data submitted by users through the website, including inquiries and contact information, is used solely for service provision and communication purposes. Data processing is carried out in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

GloReal Investments reserves the right to update, modify, or suspend the operation of the website without prior notice. We may also amend these Terms of Use at any time to ensure compliance with legal requirements and service development.

If a user does not agree with these Terms of Use, they are not permitted to use the website. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of these terms.
